name: Komodo
description: Open-source tool for building and deploying Docker containers across a fleet of servers with a web UI.

seo.title: Komodo — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Komodo: Open-source tool for building and deploying Docker containers across a fleet of servers with a web UI.

when_to_use: Web UI to deploy Docker containers across server fleets
Open-source server fleet management for container workloads
Git-triggered Docker deployments with rollback support
Stack deployments with Docker Compose file management

pros: Clean web UI for managing Docker across many servers
Good middle ground between Portainer and K8s
Build + deploy unified in one tool
cons: Young project, smaller community than Portainer
Not a real orchestrator, no advanced scheduling
Docs still sparse on advanced topics
review.verdict: A pragmatic Docker fleet manager for small teams who don't want full Kubernetes complexity.
review.best_for: Homelab and small-company ops managing a handful of Docker hosts with a GUI.
review.not_for: Teams needing real orchestration, autoscaling, or multi-tenant isolation.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
